# baseten_instance_types (Data Source)

Lists Baseten instance types available to the authenticated account.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Stable Terraform data source identifier.
- `instance_types` (Attributes List) Baseten instance types. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--instance_types))

<a id="nestedatt--instance_types"></a>
### Nested Schema for `instance_types`

Read-Only:

- `gpu_count` (Number) Number of GPUs.
- `gpu_memory_limit_mib` (Number) GPU memory limit in mebibytes, when present.
- `gpu_type` (String) GPU type, when the instance includes a GPU.
- `id` (String) Baseten instance type identifier.
- `memory_limit_mib` (Number) Memory limit in mebibytes.
- `millicpu_limit` (Number) CPU limit in millicpu.
- `name` (String) Baseten instance type display name.
